title: Experts Gather to Discuss Nigeria’s Digital Economy - FinancialEDGE
description: The Finance Correspondents Association of Nigeria (FICAN) held its 35th Annual Conference in Lagos, bringing together industry experts, regulators, and financial institutions to discuss the theme "Bracing for the Digital Economy in Nigeria: Taxation, Banking and Finance". The conference served as an agenda-setting forum for stakeholders in the economy, focusing on emerging issues in digital
html:
The Finance Correspondents Association of Nigeria (FICAN) held its 35th Annual Conference in Lagos, bringing together industry experts, regulators, and financial institutions to discuss the theme “Bracing for the Digital Economy in Nigeria: Taxation, Banking and Finance”.

The conference served as an agenda-setting forum for stakeholders in the economy, focusing on emerging issues in digital finance.

It also explored how technology is reshaping fiscal policy, financial services, and economic inclusion in Nigeria’s digital economy.

Photo Caption; L-R: Friday Ekeoba, Managing Editor National Wire, Collins Nweze, Assistant Business Editor The Nation Newspaper, Professor Akintola Owolabi, Department of Cost and Management Accounting at Lagos Business School ( LBS) and Odume Festus, Editorial / Project Director Financial Edge at the conference in Lagos.
